name: GOLFTEC Boise
about: GOLFTEC Boise is a golf training and club fitting center that utilizes technology to improve player performance. The facility offers indoor lessons, practice sessions, and club fittings using advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors. Coaches provide data-driven instruction to help golfers identify swing issues and create personalized improvement plans. The center also sells golf clubs and equipment, offering a 60-day return policy on most items, excluding simulator packages. The business operates with a structured booking process for lessons and fittings and has a pro shop offering a 10% discount on retail-priced gear.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors for precise swing analysis.
PGA award-winning coaches provide personalized, data-driven instruction for all skill levels.
A fitting service claims to add 21 more yards off the tee on average.
Access to training bays with launch monitors and video feedback for dedicated practice sessions.

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; likely BYOB not permitted.

simulator_hardware.notes: The website mentions the use of 'launch monitors' but does not specify the brand or model.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own clubs. The facility also offers club fitting services and has a pro shop where you can purchase custom-fit clubs and gear.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any food or drink service. It is advised to confirm their policy on outside food and beverage directly with the center, as most training facilities do not allow outside consumables.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This facility focuses on lessons, practice, and fitting using technology and simulators rather than a full 18-hole course experience. The time for a typical lesson or practice session varies based on the booking.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly? Are there junior programs?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC is kid-friendly and offers junior programs. The technology and coaching are designed to help juniors see and understand their progress, making it suitable for youth golfers.
